task: Task 1 — Resolve O9 (Lever 13 L2 abstraction selection)
selection_method_rationale: Symbolic checker (pokemon_rule_checker.py) exposes no importance_metrics attribute or method. Classes: ViolationResult, Path. Functions: check_chain, check_chain_file, load_chain, _available, _permanent_faint, _switch_out. Frequency fallback triggered per artifacts/lever_13_fallback.md Amendment #4 patch: importance branch requires non-empty 'scored' dict; checker returns nothing → fallback activates.
score_definition: Count of violated chains where this abstraction is the primary violation (first rule matched in symbolic checker output). Mapped from violation_type and details fields in phase3_results_v4.csv. Mapping: dead_unit_returns→ToolAvailability, hp_resurrection/faint_no_permanence→ResourceBudget_HP, double_availability→ToolAvailability, causal_incoherence→SubGoalTransition (R11) or ToolAvailability (R10) per details regex, monotone_increase→ResourceBudget_PP (pp_action resources) or ResourceBudget_time (match_time_remaining). ResourceBudget_status, ResourceBudget_boost, InformationState have no active rules in v5.3 and score 0.
ranking_notes: No tie-break required — all non-zero scores are distinct. Dimensional-only abstractions (ResourceBudget_status, ResourceBudget_boost) and InformationState (no v5.3 rule) all score 0 and naturally exclude from top-3 per SPEC §7.1 Lever 13 documented feature.
